The paper was confirmed as existing in the Semantic Scholar academic database (CorpusID:122644314). The automated checker flagged a first-author mismatch ("C Radhakrishna Rao" vs. "R. Rao"), but this is a well-known minor name formatting discrepancy — C. Radhakrishna Rao is the full name of the statistician commonly known as C. R. Rao, and "R. Rao" in the database is simply an abbreviated/truncated rendering of his name. The title, venue (Mathematical Proceedings of the Cambridge Philosophical Society), and year (1949) are consistent with Rao's known body of work.

EXPLANATION: The paper was verified in Semantic Scholar (CorpusID:122644314); the author mismatch between "C Radhakrishna Rao" and "R. Rao" is a minor name abbreviation/formatting difference for the well-known statistician C. R. Rao, not a fabrication.
